fields.label: Webinar Key Name or ID

fields.description: Whether the co-organizer has no GoToWebinar account

fields.description: The co-organizer's organizer key for the webinar

fields.label: Webinar Key Name or ID

fields.label: Co-Organizer Key
fields.description: Key of the co-organizer to delete

fields.label: Is External
fields.description: By default only internal co-organizers (with a GoToWebinar account) can be deleted. If you want to use this call for external co-organizers you have to set this parameter to 'true'.

fields.label: Webinar Key Name or ID
fields.description: Key of the webinar to retrieve all co-organizers from. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.description: Max number of results to return
